_notes: W-1 authoring data for the Verdant region world map. The spine is the canonical linear route; node coordinates are hand-placed on the painted road and verified against the road-pixel mask. Node types (battle/shop/campfire) shuffle per run within the spine under the constraints below; start and boss are fixed. 'life' holds W-7 ambient-animation coordinates, authored in the same pass. Approximate polylines — refine during W-7 implementation. 2026-07-02 rev 2: node coordinates corrected onto the road ribbon (density-filtered mask excludes clearings/blobs; every mid-spine node visually audited via crosshair crops); nodes gained display names and battleTheme keys — each node's TD battle map is themed to its world-map landmark. rev 3: Standing Stones moved onto the road ribbon west of the circle; Lakeside Hamlet node replaced by Charcoal Burners' Camp (the smoking huts, upper-left sweep) to even out landmark spacing — the hamlet remains scenery with its smoke/boat animation points. rev 4: bend-spread pass — pasture up its bend, stones onto the visible road center (wide road there is density-excluded from the ribbon mask; visually placed), monolith west along the road, corrupted mile down to the last healthy bend, boss at the keep gate on the grey road. rev 5: stones marker moved onto the road itself just west of the circle (321,217) per user annotation. rev 6: assets restructured under assets/worlds/verdant/; image path now relative to this file. rev 7 (2026-07-05): spine re-synced to the regenerated region art (viewBox now 1024×474) and to drill.js's VERDANT_REGION — nodes re-placed via user-targeted grid cells (52×24 grid of 20px cells, cell centers snapped to the road-pixel mask); Abandoned Village node removed, Fishing Camp (stilted lakehouse, battleTheme lakeshore) added on the lake's north shore, The Corrupted Mile renamed The Abandoned Town (keeps the ruins theme); the 'life' block below is superseded by RVM_AMBIENT in drill.js (W-7 implemented) and its coordinates still reference the old 1024×572 art.

typeRules.eliteIsOptIn: W-2 — elite is a per-battle engagement choice, not a node type
